title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
description: Spaghetti Carbonara is a traditional Roman dish where hot pasta is tossed with a creamy sauce made from eggs, Pecorino Romano cheese, crispy pancetta, and freshly ground black pepper. The key is to use the heat of the pasta to cook the eggs into a silky sauce without scrambling them.
ingredients: Spaghetti pasta, Eggs, Pecorino Romano cheese, Pancetta or guanciale, Black pepper, Salt

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken (tikka) cooked in a smooth buttery & creamy tomato based gravy.
description: Chicken Tikka Masala is a globally loved dish with tender chicken pieces marinated in yogurt and spices, grilled until smoky, then simmered in a rich tomato and cream-based sauce. Flavored with garam masala, cumin, and coriander, it pairs perfectly with basmati rice or naan bread.
ingredients: Chicken breast or thighs, Yogurt, Tomatoes (or tomato puree), Onions, Garlic, Ginger, Heavy cream or coconut cream, Butter, Garam masala, Cumin, Coriander, Turmeric, Chili powder, Salt

title: Beef Stroganoff
summary: Tender strips of beef simmered in a creamy mushroom and onion sauce.
description: Beef Stroganoff is a hearty Russian-inspired dish made of sautéed beef strips, mushrooms, and onions, simmered in a rich sour cream sauce. Traditionally served over egg noodles or rice, it’s a comfort food classic that’s both creamy and savory.
ingredients: Beef sirloin or tenderloin, Mushrooms, Onions, Garlic, Butter, Flour, Beef broth, Sour cream, Mustard (optional), Paprika, Salt, Black pepper
